SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.macros

Class StrategyProofMacro

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.AbstractProofMacro
de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.StrategyProofMacro
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProofMacro
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractBlastingMacro, AbstractPropositionalExpansionMacro, AutoMacro, AutoPilotPrepareProofMacro, FinishSymbolicExecutionMacro, FinishSymbolicExecutionUntilMergePointMacro, OneStepProofMacro, PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro, TestGenMacro, UseInformationFlowContractMacro, WellDefinednessMacro
public abstract class StrategyProofMacro extends AbstractProofMacro
The abstract class StrategyProofMacro can be used to define proof macros which use their own strategy. In order to implement a StrategyProofMacro, override createStrategy(Proof, PosInOccurrence). This class is aware of Position in occurrences and can also be applied to inner nodes. Both RuleApplicationManager and Strategy are changed for the course of the macro but are restored afterwards using a ProverTaskListener.
See Also:
  • ProverTaskListener
  • Strategy

  • Method Details

    • createStrategy

      protected abstract Strategy<Goal> createStrategy(Proof proof, PosInOccurrence posInOcc)

    • canApplyTo

      public boolean canApplyTo(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals, PosInOccurrence posInOcc)
      Can this macro be applied on the given goals? This method should not make any changes but check if the macro can be applied or not on the given goals. This method may be called from within the GUI thread and be compatible with that fact. This macro can always be applied (does not change anything perhaps) TODO make this only applicable if it has an impact.
      Parameters:
      proof - the current Proof (not null)
      goals - the goals (not null)
      posInOcc - the position in occurrence (may be null)
      Returns:
      true, if the macro is allowed to be applied

    • doPostProcessing

      protected void doPostProcessing(Proof proof)
      Subclasses can use this method to do some postprocessing on the proof-object after the strategy has finished.
      Parameters:
      proof - The proof object.

    • applyTo

      public ProofMacroFinishedInfo applyTo(UserInterfaceControl uic, Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals, PosInOccurrence posInOcc, ProverTaskListener listener) throws InterruptedException
      Description copied from interface: ProofMacro
      Apply this macro on the given goals. This method can change the proof by applying rules to it. This method is usually called from a dedicated thread and not the GUI thread. The thread it runs on may be interrupted. In this case, the macro may report the interruption by an InterruptedException. A ProverTaskListener can be provided to which the progress will be reported. If no reports are desired, null cna be used for this parameter. If more than one listener is needed, consider combining them using a single listener object using the composite pattern.
      Parameters:
      uic - the UserInterfaceControl to use
      proof - the current Proof (not null)
      goals - the goals (not null)
      posInOcc - the position in occurrence (may be null)
      listener - the listener to use for progress reports (may be null)
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the application of the macro has been interrupted.
